tools.name: get_top_carriers
tools.descriptionHash: af40et Share Report) dataset, plus which data years are loaded. Free.

tools.name: get_carriers_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the carrier market-share dataset (NAIC Market Share Report, P/C): Florida's top 5 carriers for total-all-lines, latest data year, with the STATE TOTAL/all_other rows and CR4/CR10 concentration. Free.

tools.name: get_premium
tools.description: Time series of E&S/surplus lines premium and policy counts for a state, optionally by coverage line, date range, and granularity. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/premium.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Year-over-year premium and policy count summary for a state and year. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/premium/summary.

tools.name: get_top_insurers
tools.description: Top insurers by E&S/surplus lines premium for a state and period (month, half-year, or year), each with the carrier's latest-year combined and losses-incurred ratio joined by NAIC code (premium AND loss ratios in one call). $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/insurers.

tools.name: compare_states
tools.description: Compare premium/policy count series across multiple states side-by-side. $0.50 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/compare.

tools.name: check_eligibility
tools.description: Look up NAIC IID (Quarterly Listing of Alien Insurers) surplus-lines eligibility -- nationwide under NRRA -- for an insurer by name or alien ID, or list the current roster with recent additions/removals. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/eligibility.

tools.name: get_citizens_pif
tools.description: Citizens Property Insurance Corporation (Florida) monthly policies-in-force by product line, optionally broken out by coverage (wind/ex_wind), region (tri_county/remainder), or filtered to a single county. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/citizens/pif.

tools.name: get_citizens_depopulation
tools.description: Citizens Property Insurance Corporation (Florida) depopulation (takeout) activity: annual totals by policy type, or company-level detail for years with published detail (2017, 2018, 2021+). $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/citizens/depopulation.

tools.name: get_top_carriers
tools.description: Top carriers (NAIC group codes and standalone companies, ranked together per the report's own methodology) by direct premiums written for a jurisdiction (or countrywide) and line of business, with year-over-year change and CR4/CR10 concentration. `line` accepts a category to fan out into multiple li

tools.name: get_carrier_profile
tools.description: One carrier's multi-year trajectory (rank, dpw, market_share, YoY) for a single line and scope (a jurisdiction or countrywide), plus group member companies for group codes. DELIBERATE single-scope limit: use compare_carrier_states for a cross-state comparison. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/carrie

tools.name: compare_carrier_states
tools.description: One carrier's footprint across states for a line and year: per-state rank/dpw/market_share/YoY, plus the countrywide reference row. $0.50 per query -- the cross-state differentiator, mirrors compare_states. Mirrors GET /v1/carriers/footprint.

tools.name: list_cat_events
tools.description: List U.S. hurricane catastrophe events (FEMA disaster declarations grouped into named storms, with NOAA landfall category/wind), most recent first. Filter by `state` (2-letter code), `year`, or `peril`. Free -- the discovery bait for /v1/cat/counties and /v1/cat/exposure.

tools.name: get_cat_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the hurricane/catastrophe dataset: recent events plus the latest FL-affecting hurricane's Florida exposure headline (declared counties and their share of statewide surplus-lines premium). Free.

tools.name: get_cat_counties
tools.description: Per-county FEMA disaster-declaration detail for one hurricane event (declaration type/date, incident window, IA/PA/IH/HM program flags). Filter by `state`. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/cat/counties. Free discovery: /v1/cat/events, /v1/cat/sample.

tools.name: get_cat_exposure
tools.description: Hurricane exposure: the latest annual county-level surplus-lines premium for a state, annotated by which counties were federally declared for a given storm, with the declared-zone premium and its share of the statewide total. A current-book snapshot, NOT a pre-vs-post change. `state` defaults FL. $0

tools.name: get_cat_impact
tools.description: Hurricane premium impact: the change in county-level surplus-lines premium in a storm's federally-declared counties, the last full year BEFORE landfall vs the first full year AFTER, with the rest of the state as a control. The E&S-grows-after-a-storm signal, quantified. `state` defaults FL. $0.50 pe

tools.name: get_hazard_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the natural-hazard risk dataset (FEMA National Risk Index): Florida's highest-risk counties (composite) plus the surplus-lines premium-overlay headline, and the perils/states available. Free.

tools.name: get_hazard
tools.description: County natural-hazard risk scores for a state and peril (FEMA National Risk Index): Expected Annual Loss ($), EAL/Risk scores (0-100) and ratings, ranked by loss. `peril` is composite (default) or one of 18 hazards (wildfire, coastal_flood, hurricane, earthquake, ...). $0.10 per query. Free discover

tools.name: get_hazard_premium
tools.description: Premium overlay: a state's latest annual county-level surplus-lines premium alongside each county's FEMA hazard Expected Annual Loss for a peril, ranked by loss -- which counties carry the risk, and the E&S premium riding on it. `state` defaults FL (the only state with county premium today). $0.50 p

tools.name: get_solvency_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the multi-state carrier-distress dataset: headline counts plus a few recent liquidations and recent enforcement fines. Free -- the discovery bait for /v1/solvency and /v1/enforcement.

tools.name: get_carrier_solvency
tools.description: Is a carrier in trouble? Look up a company's receivership/liquidation record plus its enforcement actions (fines, license suspensions/revocations) across the covered states in one dossier, or list receivership estates by status. Add `state` to narrow. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/solvency. Free

tools.name: list_enforcement_actions
tools.description: The multi-state insurer enforcement ledger: fines and license suspensions/revocations/denials from state regulators (FL OIR, Texas TDI, New York DFS, California CDI, Washington OIC), plus Florida's examinations and investigations roster. Filter by `insurer`, `state`, `action_type`, or `year`. $0.10

tools.name: get_rate_filings_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the SERFF admitted-market rate-filings dataset: per-state (CA, MS, TX, WA) filing counts and date range, plus a few of the largest recent rate increases. Admitted-market rate activity is a leading indicator of surplus-lines (E&S) growth. Free -- the discovery bait for /v1/rates and /v

tools.name: get_rate_filings
tools.description: Browse or filter admitted-market SERFF rate filings (Texas TDI open data, Mississippi MID bulletins, California CDI rate-filing approvals, and Washington OIC annual reports): filter by `state` (CA|MS|TX|WA), `line` (coverage category or TOI name substring), `insurer` (name substring), `min_change` (

tools.name: get_rate_activity
tools.description: The rate-activity index: admitted-market SERFF rate filings aggregated by state x coverage line x period (month/quarter/year) -- filing_count, avg_rate_change_pct, share_increasing/share_decreasing, max_increase. Compare states with `states=TX,MS`. Admitted-market rate activity is a leading indicato

tools.name: get_rates_vs_premium
tools.description: The leading-indicator join: E&S/surplus-lines premium (plus YoY growth) aligned period-by-period against admitted-market SERFF rate-filing activity (filing_count, avg_rate_change_pct, share_increasing, max_increase) on the shared coverage category. `lag` shifts the rate series back N periods so you

tools.name: get_syndicate_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the Lloyd's of London syndicate-results dataset: how many syndicates are covered, the forecast year-of-account range, and a few example syndicate dossiers (capacity + estimated result forecast). Free -- the discovery bait for /v1/syndicates.

tools.name: get_syndicate
tools.description: How is a Lloyd's of London syndicate performing? Look up a syndicate's capacity and Lloyd's estimated result forecast (worst/best case % on capacity, by year of account) plus its US surplus-lines eligibility, or browse syndicates by managing agent. $0.10 per query. Mirrors GET /v1/syndicates. Free d

tools.name: get_financials_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the insurer financial-cards dataset: a handful of carriers' latest-fiscal-year headline figures (assets, surplus, gross premium, combined/losses-incurred ratios, IRIS distress count) plus a distress-screen headline. Free -- the discovery bait for /v1/financials, /v1/financials/reinsur

tools.name: get_carrier_financials
tools.description: A carrier's statutory-statement financial dossier: identity (domicile, FEIN, parent, incorporation date) plus its full loaded fiscal-year series (assets, surplus, premium, IRIS distress ratios), from each carrier's NAIC annual-statement filing. Requires `insurer` or `naic`; add `year` to narrow to o

tools.name: get_financials_reinsurers
tools.description: A carrier's reinsurer panel from its NAIC annual-statement filing (the 'Reinsurers (Top 5)' schedule): reinsurer name, class, authorization status, gross recovery, and amounts over 120 days overdue. Requires `insurer` or `naic`. $0.10 per query. Free discovery: /v1/financials/sample.

tools.name: get_financials_distress
tools.description: The IRIS distress screen: carriers whose NAIC annual-statement filing reports a published, NON-ZERO count of IRIS ratios outside the usual range for a fiscal year (NULL/unpublished years are excluded, never read as zero). Filter by `year`; a carrier can appear more than once across years. $0.10 per

tools.name: get_litigation_sample
tools.description: Free sample of the Florida property-insurance litigation dataset: the headline ratio (Florida's share of the nation's homeowners' claims vs. lawsuits) and the latest three years. Free -- the discovery bait for /v1/litigation.

tools.name: get_litigation_metrics
tools.description: Florida homeowners property-insurance litigation metrics by year: Florida's share of the nation's homeowners' claims and lawsuits opened (the admitted-market litigation leading indicator that pushes risk into E&S), plus defense cost & containment expense figures. Optional `from`/`to` year window. $0

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "get_carrier_profile" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "compare_carrier_states" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_financials_reinsurers" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: A carrier's reinsurer panel from its NAIC annual-statement filing (the 'Reinsurers (Top 5)' schedule): reinsurer name, class, authorization status, gross recove…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_cat_exposure · Private data: get_carrier_solvency · Public sink: list_carrier_lines, get_carriers_sample, get_cat_sample, get_cat_exposure, get_litigation_sample, get_litigation_metrics.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_cat_exposure · Private data: get_carrier_solvency · Public sink: list_carrier_lines, get_carriers_sample, get_cat_sample, get_cat_exposure, get_litigation_sample, get_litigation_metrics

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

detail: Tool "get_top_carriers" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash af40et S)" → after: "Top carriers (NAIC group codes and standalone companies, ranked together per the report's own methodology) by direct premiums written for a jurisdiction (or countrywide) and line of business, with year-over-year change and CR4/CR10 concentration. `line` accepts a category to fan out into multiple li"

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
